text.title: API-First Development Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of API-First Development.

example.scenario: A solo founder ships a billing-portal v1 API: drafts openapi-3.1.yaml with 6 endpoints, Spectral passes 0 errors / 3 deferred warnings, Prism mock served on :4010 unblocks the frontend agent, server stubs generated via openapi-generator-cli, Dredd contract test green, bump diff shows no breaking changes vs the previous tag.
example.trace: r1-contract-first → r2-operationid-required → r3-oas-3-1-nullables → r6-ci-lint-gate → artefact green
